title: Pet Munchies Wild Salmon Strips Dog Treats, Premium Grain Free Dog Chews with Natural Real Meat (Box of 8 pack 80g) 640g
features: 100% NATURAL, PREMIUM REAL SALMON: This gourmet treat is made with 100% natural, human-grade, wild salmon meat
A HEALTHY SOURCE OF OMEGA 3: Salmon provides ahealthy source of Omega 3, vitamins and minerals for supporting optimal brain & eye function and a maintaining healthy skin & coat

HEALTHY & JUNK-FREE: Our healthy wild salmon strips contain no artificial colours or flavours, are grain and gluten free and a single source protein, making them the perfect treat to feed your four legged friends

SUITABLE FOR ALL BREEDS & SIZES: Our wild salmon strips are suitable for all breeds of dogs and puppies over 4 months - please remember that these treats should make up a small part of your pet's balanced diet

SEALED WITH A DOG'S APPROVAL: Pet Munchies is a UK based company dedicated to creating premium, gourmet treats that are made with high quality, human grade meat. Our treats are delicious, nutritious and wholesome, with all the meaty flavours dogs love delicately toasted to perfection!
description: From the manufacturer About Us Pet Munchies is a range of premium, gourmet treats made with high quality, natural human grade meat and fish. The treats provide natural textures, flavours and exceptional palatability that dogs and cats love. Delicious, nutritious and wholesome, we use the fine chicken, duck, beef liver, venison, lamb, buffalo, ocean white fish and wild salmon. All our meat and fish are delicately baked to perfection in its own natural juices, to preserve flavour and quality. Our commitment We are committed to sourcing the finest ingredients and ensuring all our treats are made with 100% natural human grade meat, that are full of flavour, including grain and gluten free varieties. Your four-legged best friend deserve a life without boundaries. Where they can walk, run, climb, jump and play to their heart’s content. And we do our utmost to help you give it to them.
